parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ reveal_personal_emails: true, details: ($json.people || []).slice(0, 10).map(p => ({ id: p.id, first_name: p.first_name, last_name: p.last_name, name: p.name, title: p.title, organization_name: (p.organization || {}).name, domain: (p.organization || {}).primary_domain || (p.organization || {}).website_url, linkedin_url: p.linkedin_url })) }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ performUpsert: { fieldsToMergeOn: ['Email'] }, typecast: true, records: $json.records }) }}
